mission.text: Our mission is to implement and scale the most cost-effective solutions against violence and crime. ACTRA is the first organization attempting to scale cognitive behavioral therapy-informed programs for at-risk populations across Latin America.

stats.text: Latin America has the highest homicide rate of any region, with over 140,000 homicides per year.
The region has the fastest growing prison population in the world, costing billions in public spending.
Colombia has the 4th highest homicide rate in the Americas, with 25 homicides per 100,000 people.
